title: Raizo Is Safe
description: On pages 16–19, this part focuses on raizo is safe within the Raizo Is Safe storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm glad you are all unharmed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Is that the crest of the Kouzuki clan?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I've never seen one in that color! It's a deep red...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: that crest has been there for hundreds of years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I have heard about you, Nico Robin! It is said that those of ohara learned to read those letters.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This one is apparently for some different purpose. Can you read it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Do I have something on my face!? Why're you staring at me so intently!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: How rude. Who even are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They are the straw hat pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hurry up and fling some shuriken for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Go stand under a water- fall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Show us some earth release Jutsu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: UHHH... Fire re- lease is so much better!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Wait, now... Water release is the best!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It has nothing to do with us being pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You're making me blush over here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Have you ever gone out with a kunoichi*?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Teach yourself how to jump higher using a growing piece of bamboo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: A display of clone Jutsu would be nice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hide in the ceiling and get pierced by a spear.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Take out a scroll and say "Nin-nin"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Quit pushing your image- inations on me!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: The Ninja you have in your heads are but fantasy!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: And you call yourself a Ninja... look at yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I know... the Kanoichi won't even look my way...

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: Listen up. Ninja are, above all, silent, incon- spicuous and strong of heart!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: One who spends his lives in the shadows would never show his talents to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Whaaa!? There's a bunch of him now! Could this be...

summary: Raizo Is Safe: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
